meta.description: A modern, vibrant, and approachable e-commerce store selling hydration and wellness products. The design uses pastel and energetic color blocks, bold typography, and a clean layout to appeal to health-conscious consumers looking for functional beverages.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.display: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Centered logo, navigation links on left with dropdown indicators, minimal cart/action text on right. Announcement bar sits above header.

footer.notes: Three main columns: links, newsletter signup (center, prominent), and help links. Bold typography for headings. Social icons below newsletter input. Simple footer.

productCard.notes: Product cards in 'daily hydration' section have distinct pastel background colors, floating images, star ratings, and pill-shaped 'SHOP' buttons. Subscriptions section has clean white cards, star ratings, dropdowns, and full-width 'ADD TO BAG' buttons.

productGrid.notes: Used in 'daily hydration' and 'bestselling subscriptions' sections. Cards are uniform in size.

featuredProducts.heading: get your daily hydration
featuredProducts.notes: Grid layout with colorful, distinct cards for different product lines.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.notes: Sits at the very top of the page.

sections.name: hero

design.background: Off-white right column, full-bleed image left column
design.text: Large bold headline, standard body, rating stars
design.styling: No border, content right aligned with padding

content.headline: Main value proposition regarding product benefits
content.body: Brief explanation of the science-backed nature of the product.
content.cta: 2 prominent pill-shaped buttons. Primary is light green with black text. Secondary is light blue with black text. Both have no borders.

media.description: Overhead shot of person sitting with sports equipment and product box beside them, vibrant colors, active lifestyle feel.

content.specialElements: Star rating with customer count, checklist with checkmarks below CTA.

sections.notes: The right side acts as the main hero content block. The cart drawer is open on the right edge.

sections.name: trust-bar
sections.layout: Full-width single row, items spaced evenly

design.text: White small text with checkmark icons
design.styling: Slightly taller than a standard banner, white icons.

sections.notes: Acts as a divider between hero and product section.

sections.name: daily-hydration
sections.layout: Centered heading, grid of 4 cards below

design.text: Bold centered section heading, dark text on cards
design.styling: Generous vertical padding. Cards have solid pastel backgrounds, rounded corners (~8px), and pill buttons.

content.headline: Section title introducing product lines
content.cta: Each card has a white pill-shaped outline button with black text. One card shows an active red 'GET 2 FREE BAGS' overlay.

media.description: Product packaging with corresponding pastel backgrounds and small floating ingredient/benefit icons.

content.specialElements: Red promotional pop-up tab on first card.

sections.notes: Cards represent distinct functional categories (hydrate, energy, sleep, immunity).

sections.name: testimonials
sections.layout: Centered heading with rating, grid of 3 visible cards (slider format)

design.text: Bold headings, regular text in cards
design.styling: Cards have thin black borders, square corners (0px), profile image overlapping top border.

content.headline: Large customer count and satisfaction statement

media.description: Customer profile pictures in circles overlapping the card top edge. Product image and name in a black footer block inside each card.

sections.notes: Testimonial cards feature a distinct black bottom section linking to the specific product reviewed.

design.text: Bold section heading, small dark text inside white overlay boxes
design.styling: Images have rounded corners. White info boxes placed bottom left over images.

content.headline: Section title prompting user to shop by need
content.cta: Small 'SHOP [CATEGORY]' link with arrow in each box

media.description: Lifestyle photography of people consuming or preparing the product in different settings (morning, workout, evening).

design.text: Dark text, bold titles, centered alignment
design.styling: Generous vertical padding. Circular icon containers.

media.description: Illustrative icons in white circles representing time, ingredients, science, and performance.

design.background: Warm off-white/cream gradient or split. Left is image, right is solid cream background.
design.text: Large bold heading, standard body paragraph
design.styling: No border, content vertically centered on right.

content.headline: Aspirational heading about achieving goals
content.body: Paragraph explaining who the product is for (productive people going the extra mile).
content.cta: Single white pill-shaped button with black text 'SHOP NOW'

media.description: Aesthetic flat lay of a smoothie bowl, spoon, product stick pack, and a glass of water on a warm-toned surface with harsh shadows.

sections.name: science-feature
sections.layout: Full width single column, text left-aligned with max width

design.text: Dark text, bold heading, regular body

content.headline: Statement about scientific backing
content.body: Short paragraph detailing commitment to research and testing.
content.cta: Single white pill-shaped button with black text 'LEARN MORE'

sections.name: comparison-table
sections.layout: Centered heading, centered table with max width

design.styling: Table has thin gray borders. The brand's column has a distinct blue header and very light blue background to highlight it.

content.headline: Question heading prompting comparison
content.cta: Single black pill-shaped button with white text centered below the table.
content.specialElements: Table comparing brand vs generic sports drinks vs water across various metrics (speed, electrolytes, sugar, etc.).

sections.name: bestselling-subscriptions

design.text: Dark text, bold product titles, centered content in cards
design.styling: Generous vertical padding. Cards have no background (blend with section bg) and form-like elements (dropdowns, checkboxes).

content.headline: Section title for top subscription products
content.cta: Full-width white pill-shaped outline button with black text 'ADD TO BAG' on each item.
content.specialElements: Each product has a star rating, price, variant dropdown, and a 'Subscribe and Save' checkbox.

sections.notes: Focus on subscription conversion with functional form elements directly in the grid.
